name: my-enterprise-mcp-server
description: Provides database queries, REST API access, and file operations for enterprise Java systems.

tools.name: queryDatabase
tools.description: Run a read-only SQL query on the application database

tools.name: listTables
tools.description: List all tables in the database schema

tools.name: getCustomer
tools.description: Fetch customer data by ID from the internal CRM API

tools.name: searchOrders
tools.description: Search orders by status: PENDING, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED

tools.name: listFiles
tools.description: List files in the workspace directory

params.name: subdir
params.description: Subdirectory path relative to workspace, or empty for root

tools.name: readFile
tools.description: Read the contents of a file in the workspace
